name: DLL Loading via certoc.exe
description: Detects the use of certoc.exe to load DLLs, a technique that can be used to bypass security restrictions.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'certoc.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the certoc.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute certoc.exe, including a '-LoadDll' or '/LoadDll' argument and the path to the DLL.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which certoc.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
